name: antinote
title: Antinote
description: Extension to control Antinote app. Create new notes and search notes with Raycast.
author: sc0

tools.name: create-note
tools.title: Create Note
tools.description: Creates a brand new note with whatever markdown content you throw at it. Fresh canvas, ready to go.

tools.name: insert-text
tools.title: Insert Text
tools.description: Drops in markdown content at a specific line number in an existing note. Perfect for adding things exactly where you want them.

tools.name: replace-text
tools.title: Replace Text
tools.description: Swaps out an old string with new markdown content. Basically find-and-replace on steroids.

tools.name: read-note
tools.title: Read Note
tools.description: Pulls up the full markdown content of a specific note by its ID. Like opening a file to see what's inside.

tools.name: get-current-note
tools.title: Get Current Note
tools.description: Grabs whatever note you've got open right now. No need to hunt for the ID — just ask.

tools.name: search-content
tools.title: Search Content
tools.description: Digs through your notes looking for matching content. Great for finding that one idea you scribbled down three weeks ago.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
